title: 管理工作台

overview.title: 概览
overview.summary: 管理者就绪状态、档案、范围和模块状态。

groups.title: 管理分组

groups.readinessMessage: 管理分组在本批次仅显示就绪状态。Overview 保留已分配范围摘要；不会暴露独立 Groups 模块路由或设置页面。

members.title: 管理成员
members.summary: 分配范围内的成员上下文。
members.disabledReason: Manager Members 契约尚未启用。
members.readinessMessage: 管理成员在本批次仅显示就绪状态。People Hub 和 Admin EmploymentProfile 数据不会作为 Manager Members 模块暴露。

overview.readinessSummary: 当前管理上下文和分配就绪状态。
overview.kpiSummary: 管理 KPI 可见性由有效分配决定。
overview.unsupportedSummary: 这些 Manager 模块需要未来后端契约后才能显示运营数据。

kpi.title: 我管理的 KPI
kpi.summary: 通过当前有效管理分配可见的已发布 KPI 计划。

detail.subject: 对象

detail.noAllocations: 此计划暂无可见分配行。

work.title: Managed Work
work.summary: Published official WorkShifts for active managed members.
work.draftNotice: Draft rosters are not visible until published.

copy.planning: Availability is a pre-roster planning signal for Admin/Ops.
copy.noAttendance: It is not attendance, payroll, paid leave, or unpaid leave evidence.
copy.noAutoApply: Approved lines are not auto-applied. Admin/Ops must apply them to a Draft Monthly Roster.
copy.otherAdvisory: Other availability notes are advisory only.

validation.maxLines: Add at least one managed member and keep the batch within 50 lines.
validation.lineRequired: Add at least one availability line.
validation.dateRequired: Start and end date are required.
validation.dateOrder: End date must be the same as or after start date.
validation.preferredTime: Preferred time lines need a valid start and end time.
validation.memberTargetMismatch: Every availability line must use a member from the selected exact target.

states.emptyBatches: No availability batches for this month.
states.emptyMembersMessage: No eligible managed members were returned for the selected exact target.
states.loadingMembers: Loading eligible members for the selected target...
states.memberLoadError: Eligible members could not be loaded. Availability submission is blocked.

copy.approval: Requests do not change official shifts until Admin/Ops approval.
copy.draftRoster: Draft roster rows are not requestable.
copy.cancellation: Use request cancellation only for pending requests.
copy.taxonomy: Leave/absence policy is not classified in this step. This is schedule change request, not attendance.

validation.noLines: Add at least one request line.
validation.maxLines: A batch can contain at most 50 lines.
validation.reason: Each line reason must be 10-1000 characters.
validation.shiftRequired: Choose an active official WorkShift for reschedule or cancel.
validation.windowRequired: Create and reschedule lines require start and end.
validation.windowOrder: Requested end must be after requested start.
validation.lineMonth: Requested line dates must be inside the selected request month.
validation.periodWindow: Choose the current month or one of the next two months.
validation.duplicate: Remove duplicate request lines before submitting.

feedback.submitFailed: Request batch could not be submitted.

empty.noMembersMessage: The request composer needs manager-safe member data from published active shifts.

empty.workNoMembersMessage: No eligible active managed members are available.

empty.kpiMessage: 只有存在有效分配时才显示单元 KPI 和艺人组 KPI。
